label: Ashseal Stockroom
description: Ashseal Stockroom serves as the secured storage chamber of the Gloam Reliquary, enclosed in vitrified stone and sealed with heavy gaskets against the basin’s abrasive storm-ash. Ceiling-high shelving and chained pallet racks hold tagged crates of void-plate offcuts, insulated cabling coils, and lead-lined caskets reserved for suspect or sanctified components. Wire-caged lumen strips and shielded conduit runs reinforce the room against Nocturnis Bastion’s persistent auroral surges and vox-scrape. The deck is plated in scored slagcrete with inset tie-down rings, its surface marked by long drag-grooves from repeated handling of dense salvage loads.
